title: The War a Godly Man Wins Before His Phone Ever Rings
caption:
The first fight of the day isn't in your head. It's in your hand, before your feet hit the floor.

A godly man doesn't win the war against his phone with a detox. He wins it with a few small, boring lines he doesn't cross: where it charges, who gets his eyes first, what he names before he reaches for the screen.

Start with one hour it can't touch. Then build from there.

#faith #discipline #selfcontrol #christianman #manofgod
